feedback.text: Hello, As an EU citizen, I hope that this initiative will extend to protect video games and their preservation. With companies that develop live-service games, many games are left unplayable after the end of service. Even if consumers pay to play the games, they often cannot play them anymore. This initiative, together with the "Stop Killing Games" initiative, can work as a great protection for consumer rights regarding video games. I hope you take the feedback into consideration. Kind Regards.
